info.title: AirlineSim BFF API
info.description: Backend-for-frontend API. Based on backend OpenAPI and extended with BFF cache/filter query parameters.

post.description: Purchases a new aircraft from a selected aircraft type for the authenticated user

400.description: 1 - request validation error, 2 - aircraft type not found

get.description:
Returns a list of available aircraft types

BFF caches this list in memory, retries backend 500 responses up to 4 attempts, and supports exact field filters plus q search across text fields.

parameters.description: Search query applied to all string fields.
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: Force BFF to refresh its in-memory cache from backend.
parameters.name: refresh

post.description: Create a new aircraft type (admin only)

get.description: Returns details for a single aircraft type
Returns details for a single aircraft owned by the airline
Returns list of aircrafts owned by the authenticated airline

post.description: Creates an airline for the authenticated user

400.description: 1 - request validation error, 2 - airport not found, 3 - user not found

get.description: Returns full airline information by airline id

patch.description: Update airline name and codes (iata, icao). Only owner or admin allowed.

parameters.description: Fields to update: name, iata_code, icao_code
parameters.name: request

get.description: Returns full airline information for the authenticated user

400.description: 1 - request validation error, 2 - country with such country_id dont exists, 3 - region with such region_id dont exists

409.description: Airport with such ICAO/IATA already exists

400.description: 1 - request validation error, 2 - country not found, 3 - region not found

get.description:
Returns all airports

BFF caches this list in memory, retries backend 500 responses up to 4 attempts, and supports exact field filters plus q search across text fields.

parameters.description: Search query applied to all string fields.
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: Force BFF to refresh its in-memory cache from backend.
parameters.name: refresh

post.description: Returns access token and sets refresh token into cookie

400.description: 1 - request validation error, 2 - user not found

post.description: Returns access token and sets refresh token into cookie. Doing that by validating refresh token

401.description: Refresh token or user is not valid

post.description: Returns access token and sets refresh token into cookie

400.description: 1 - request validation error, 2 - email exists, 3 - nickname exists

get.description:
Returns all countries

BFF caches this list in memory, retries backend 500 responses up to 4 attempts, and supports exact field filters plus q search across text fields.

parameters.description: Search query applied to all string fields.
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: Force BFF to refresh its in-memory cache from backend.
parameters.name: refresh

409.description: Country with such ISO already exists

400.description: 1 - request validation error, 2 - country with such country_id dont exists

409.description: Region with such local code already exists

201.description: Region Link created successfully, id returned

400.description: 1 - request validation error, 2 - region with such region_id dont exists

409.description: Region Link with such regions already exists

400.description: 1 - request validation error, 2 - region not found

get.description:
Returns all region links

BFF caches this list in memory, retries backend 500 responses up to 4 attempts, and supports exact field filters plus q search across text fields.

parameters.description: Search query applied to all string fields.
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: Force BFF to refresh its in-memory cache from backend.
parameters.name: refresh

400.description: 1 - request validation error, 2 - country not found

get.description:
Returns all regions

BFF caches this list in memory, retries backend 500 responses up to 4 attempts, and supports exact field filters plus q search across text fields.

parameters.description: Search query applied to all string fields.
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: Force BFF to refresh its in-memory cache from backend.
parameters.name: refresh

get.description: Lazily calculates base daily passenger demand for an airport pair using airport, region and region-link data. If the linked regions do not have cached base demand, BFF writes the generated values back to the backend region-link endpoint.
